formula: ELF3 = max(ELF4, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(PHYB * GHD7, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

PRR37 = (max(Photoperiod_LD, 0.01) * max(PHYB, 0.01) * max(PHYC, 0.01) * max(GI, 0.01) * max(MA2_SMYD, 0.01) * max(ID1, 0.01))^(1/6) * min(1/max(CCA1 * ELF3 * LUX, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
GHD7 = (max(Photoperiod_LD, 0.01) * max(PHYB, 0.01) * max(PHYC, 0.01) * max(ID1, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(ELF3 * LUX, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
CO = (max(GI, 0.01) * max(FKF1, 0.01) * max(MA2_SMYD, 0.01) * max(ID1, 0.01) * max(PRR37, 0.01))^(1/5) * min(1/max(PHYB, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
EHD1 = (max(GI, 0.01) * max(ID1, 0.01) * max(CO, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(PRR37 * GHD7, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FT1 = (max(CO, 0.01) * max(EHD1, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(PHYB * PRR37 * GHD7, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FT8 = (max(ID1, 0.01) * max(CO, 0.01) * max(EHD1, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(PRR37 * GHD7 * AP2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FT10 = (max(ID1, 0.01) * max(CO, 0.01) * max(EHD1, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(PRR37 * GHD7, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
SOC1 = (max(FT1, 0.01) * max(FT8, 0.01) * max(FT10, 0.01) * max(SBP4, 0.01))^(1/4) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Flowering_Time = (max(FT12, 0.01) * max(AP2, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(FT1 * FT8 * FT10 * SOC1 * AP1 * GF14 * Gibberellin * ID1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
